summary: I tracked down the issue in the URL validator: it only blocked IPv4 loopback via string checks, so IPv6 loopbacks like `[::1]` slipped through and let the proxy hit the internal service. I updated `validator.py` to parse hostnames with `ip_address` and block any non-public IP (loopback, private, link-local, etc.). After the fix, `test.sh` passes—IPv6 loopback requests are now blocked and no secrets leak.
